progetti.descrizione: For this project, I planned and executed the aerial drone footage, helping to lend a sense of spaciousness and dynamism to the campaign images. My work allowed us to capture the balance between luxury, comfort, and outdoor living from above, offering a unique perspective that effectively highlighted the creative concept.

A music video I directed for the artist Avalant. The composer's intention with this track is to recreate a specific moment: one of abstraction and mental journey. To visually convey this idea, I chose geometric shapes and color palettes capable of evoking that sense of detachment from reality—a visual language that interacts with the Synthwave sounds of the music, yet becomes its true protagonist. Colors, movements, and visual compositions guide the viewer through different levels of abstraction, making the perceptual experience something autonomous and immediate, even before the music comes into play.

Go to YouTube, look it up, and give it a listen.

progetti.descrizione:
A social media campaign I directed for Associazione Obliquo live event. “La notte in 30 libri” explored a new form of storytelling built around a curated collection of over thirty volumes. Visitors wore headphones delivering ASMR soundscapes while photographic projections surrounded them, weaving together visual and auditory layers into a single, cohesive experience. The result was an immersive journey through nocturnal and dreamlike atmospheres, shaped by the interplay of photobooks, illustrated works, essays, and sound — each element reinforcing the others to blur the line between reading, seeing, and dreaming.

For this event, I also served as live video director, overseeing the real-time visual direction of the performance.

Music video directed for Corale Maniaghese.
A single, long take that offers an authentic glimpse into the simple yet profound rural and family life of the last century.

A video created to showcase Falmec's participation in the SICAM Pordenone 2025 trade show.
We captured their first appearance at SICAM 2025 through a video that goes beyond simply depicting a space: it captures a vision of the contemporary kitchen.
A debut shaped by a clear vision: to design spaces where surfaces, volumes, and materials interact to create a cohesive, functional, and truly modern living environment.
A portfolio project draws inspiration from the timeless elegance of Domaine Julien Chopin, exploring the power of sharing: moments frozen in time, experiences that sparkle.

A documentary directed by me and produced by the Comune di Maniago. The documentary "Donne di seta - Un intreccio di storie al femminile" explores the connection between the silk industry and the work carried out by young women within this sector.
Through firsthand accounts and archival footage, the film reveals the crucial and often overlooked role of silk workers in the production of one of the world's finest fabrics.

progetti.descrizione: A documentary directed by me and produced by Associazione Obliquo. The documentary offers an intimate look into the extraordinary life and career of the renowned Italian designer Armando Milani. Through interviews, archival footage, and personal reflections, the film explores the roots and evolution of his creativity, from his youth to his rise as a leading figure in the world of graphic design.
Project created for Dentag Maniago to be used during the IDEM 2018 trade show.

profilo.statement: Directing is about a vision.. and i can see you deep in your soul.
